page: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-180-lssd is a memory-optimized server instance powered by dedicated AMD EPYC 9B14 processors. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it features 180 virtual CPUs across 90 physical cores with multithreading enabled. The hardware configuration includes 1440.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. Additionally, the instance is equipped with 6432 GB of local NVMe SSD storage distributed across 16 local drives, with no integrated GPUs.

Benchmark results place this server in the top tier (top 10%) for multi-core CPU performance, Passmark CPU score, and memory bandwidth write operations. It also achieves top-tier results in Redis SET operations, processing 212.07 million operations per second, and in software compilation. Single-core performance is strong, ranking in the top 25% for stress-ng and Geekbench tests. The system demonstrates top-tier efficiency in large-model LLM inference text generation, though single-threaded gzip compression remains in the average tier.

Given its massive memory capacity, high-density local NVMe storage, and top-tier multi-core performance, this instance offers high resource density for demanding enterprise workloads. It is highly suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, high-throughput Redis deployments, heavy database operations, and multi-threaded data processing tasks. The combination of high-capacity local SSDs and extensive RAM makes it an efficient choice for workloads requiring rapid data access without network storage latency.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3d-highmem-180-lssd is a memory-optimized server instance designed for resource-intensive enterprise workloads. Powered by dedicated AMD EPYC 9B14 processors on the x86_64 architecture, it features 180 vCPUs (90 physical cores) and 1440.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high 8.0 GB of memory per core. The instance includes 6432 GB of local NVMe SSD storage across 16 drives, with no GPU acceleration. In benchmark evaluations, the server delivers top-tier (top 10%) multi-core CPU performance, memory bandwidth, and Redis SET operations, alongside strong single-core execution. This hardware profile makes the instance highly suitable for large-scale in-memory databases, intensive database operations, software compilation, and multi-threaded data processing pipelines requiring high local storage throughput and massive memory capacity.

tagline: A high-density memory and storage instance featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processors and local NVMe SSDs for demanding database workloads.
